---
name: Critique
about: Attack a claim, metric, confound, reproduction, or interpretation in this repo
title: "[critique] "
labels: critique
---

This repository is intended to be attacked. Please be specific.

**What claim are you attacking?**
<!-- Quote the claim or point to the README / claim packet section. -->

**Which file / line / result does it concern?**
<!-- e.g. docs/verification_wedge_claim_packet_v0.md §4, or results/.../metrics.json delta_gate -->

**What kind of issue is this?**
<!-- One of: novelty (known under another name) / metric / confound / reproduction failure / interpretation -->

**What would change your mind?**
<!-- The concrete evidence or result that would make you accept (or strengthen) the claim. -->
